summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flowtym PMS Leave (CP) and Public Holidays management system. All backend APIs working correctly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend StaffPlanning page displays CP columns and tooltips correctly.

minor.issue: Returns floating point precision issues (e.g., 0.16000000000000014 instead of 0.16)

issues: CP balance tooltip appears correctly but may need slight delay adjustment for better UX

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/leave/config - Returns leave configuration with correct defaults (2.08 days/month)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/leave/accrual/run - Monthly accrual adds 2.08 days per employee
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/leave/balances - Returns all employee balances
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/leave/balances/{employee_id} - Returns employee CP balance with N/N-1 breakdown
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/leave/requests - Creates leave request with balance validation
Backend: PATCH /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/leave/requests/{request_id}/approve - Approves and deducts CP
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/holidays/initialize/{year} - Creates French holidays (11 holidays)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{hotel_id}/staff/planning-summary - Returns CP balances and holidays for all employees
Frontend: Login flow - Redirects to dashboard after successful login
Frontend: StaffPlanning page - Displays CP Solde column with correct balance
Frontend: StaffPlanning page - Displays CP Pris column
Frontend: StaffPlanning page - Shows tooltip with CP breakdown on hover
critical_code_review_comments: Consider rounding floating point values in API responses to avoid precision issues (e.g., round(value, 2))
The planning-summary endpoint correctly aggregates data from multiple collections - good design
seed_data_creation: Created test employee 'Marie Dupont' with 2.08 CP days via accrual. Initialized French holidays for 2026.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CP/Leave and Holiday endpoints are working. Two hotels exist in the system: 'Mas Provencal Aix' (with Ali LARABI) and 'Hotel Test CP' (with Marie Dupont). The frontend correctly displays CP balances in the StaffPlanning page with tooltips showing N/N-1 breakdown.

features_verified.leave_config: GET/PUT working with default 2.08 days/month accrual rate
features_verified.leave_accrual: Monthly accrual correctly adds 2.08 days per employee
features_verified.leave_balances: N/N-1 tracking working with cp_acquis, cp_pris, cp_restant, cp_n1 fields
features_verified.leave_requests: Create/approve flow working with balance validation and deduction
features_verified.public_holidays: French holidays initialization working (11 holidays including Easter-based)
features_verified.planning_summary: Aggregated endpoint returns employee CP data and holidays for UI
features_verified.frontend_display: CP Solde and CP Pris columns visible with tooltip breakdown
